gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently, smiles, and gestures with arms wide open to welcome learners as they introduce the topic.
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head with curiosity, and scans the room to invite responses from the learners.
a tutor steps to the side, points toward a visual display while explaining the importance of arrays in understanding multiplication.
a person gestures toward the array with both hands, highlighting the rows and emphasizing their arrangement while speaking.
a tutor moves closer to the objects, spreads arms out, and encourages the group to join in counting them together.
a person claps hands together gently, smiles brightly, and invites the class to join in counting the objects as a team.
a tutor raises both arms in celebration, happily pointing out the total number of objects as they cheerfully confirm it's six.
a person stands tall, lifts one hand in a victorious gesture while sharing the exciting conclusion that two times three equals six.
a tutor moves in a slight circular motion, uses hands to illustrate grouping, and explains how multiplication simplifies addition.
